Prefers Outside Activity CHAR 1 Activity pursuit patterns: preferred activity settings - outside facility. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
448 N3E N3E_NONE (N3E) None of Above Preferred Activity Settings CHAR 1 Activity pursuit patterns: preferred activity settings - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
449 N4A N4A_CARDS (N4A) Cards/Other Games CHAR 1 Activity pursuit patterns: general activity preference - cards/other games. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2
